seoTitle: Put Multiple Photos in One Frame in Canva
metaDescription: Learn how to combine several photos into a single frame in Canva to create collages, product showcases, or engaging social posts.
intro: Combining multiple photos into one frame is a simple way to create eye-catching collages or showcase several images at once. This guide covers how to use Canva's frame tools to bring multiple photos together.

steps.heading: Accessing the photo frame feature
steps.body: Open Canva's elements panel and search for multi-photo frame or grid layouts to use as your base.

steps.heading: Adding multiple photos into the frame
steps.body: Drag each photo into its designated section within the frame, one at a time.

steps.heading: Customizing and resizing images
steps.body: Adjust cropping and positioning within each frame section so every photo displays the way you want.

steps.heading: Saving and sharing your final design
steps.body: Once complete, download or share your combined image directly from Canva.

faq.question: How many photos can I combine in one frame?
faq.answer: The number depends on the specific grid or frame layout you choose, ranging from a couple of photos to many in a larger collage.

faq.question: Can I rearrange photos after placing them?
faq.answer: Yes, you can swap or reposition individual photos within the frame at any point before finalizing your design.

faq.question: Is this good for product showcases?
faq.answer: Yes, multi-photo frames are commonly used by businesses to display several product angles or variations in one graphic.

faq.question: Do all frame layouts work the same way?
faq.answer: Most frame layouts function similarly with drag-and-drop photo placement, though exact grid shapes vary.
